violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. A case of french fries were stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer buckets were not prepared at the time of inspection.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses at the salad prep station.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor under the fryer in the back of the kitchen is due for deep cleaning.
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
